imagePromptTemplate: Create a production-ready paid social background image for {brandName}.
Leave clean negative space for Codex to overlay the headline and proof later.
Do not include readable text, logos, trademarks, UI screenshots, or claims inside the image.
Avoid implying the viewer personally has a sensitive trait or condition.
referencePatternFallback: structured direct-response ad: one clear focal scene, quiet palette, strong negative space, simple conversion intent
copyOverlayRule: Codex overlays hook, punch, proof, CTA, and UTM labels after image generation so text variation stays deterministic.
